chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2552 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge For hearing of bail application 09.12.2024. Ms. Shumail Sikander, advocate for applicant. Mr. Saleem Akhtar Buriro, Addl. P.G. Mr. Zeeshan Rajpar, advocate has filed power on behalf of complainant. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Muhammad Younus is seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.863/2024 U/s 489-F, 420, 34 PPC of P.S. Defence, Karachi. Applicant is present on interim pre arrest bail granted to him vide order dated 04.11.2024 and matter is fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2. As per brief facts, complainant at the instance of co-accused Mst. Asma who has been arrested and is in jail, invested an amount of Rs.66,00,000/- in the business against monthly profit but thereafter she neither returned the amount nor gave any profit to the complainant. Finally, in order to return the amount she issued three cheques to the complainant which on presentation in the bank were dishonored. Applicant is father of co-accused Mst. Asma and allegedly doing family business and had received the amount but these facts whether would attract scheme of section 489-F PPC or not is yet to be decided in the trial. The counsel for complainant and learned APG have opposed the bail. 3. However, in view of above facts and grounds, this application is allowed and the ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
